news.headline: Profitability and growth strong in FY’24 despite currency impacts in Paris, France.
news.summary: Substantial increase in profit and strong organic growth were achieved in fiscal year 2024, even in the face of currency fluctuations. The positive financial results reflect a notable improvement in profitability and steady growth for the period. This success in profitability and growth is particularly noteworthy given the challenges posed by currency fluctuations throughout the year.

American Chemistry Council celebrates 40 years of Responsible Care® program in Canada, partnership with industry.
news.summary: In 2025, the industry stewardship program will reach its 40th anniversary since its launch. This week in Washington, the American Chemistry Council (ACC) hosted Canadian counterparts to celebrate their longstanding partnership. The ACC and Canadian chemical industry leaders came together to collaborate and further strengthen their alliance.

news.headline: Carolina biologist Jeffery L. Dangl wins Wolf Prize in Agriculture for his plant immune research.
news.summary: Jeffery L. Dangl, a biologist at UNC-Chapel Hill, has conducted groundbreaking research on plant immune systems, resulting in the development of innovative strategies to combat a wide range of plant diseases. This achievement was recognized on March 13, 2025, when Dangl, along with two other researchers, received a prestigious award for their work. This breakthrough has the potential to significantly impact agriculture and food security by providing effective methods to address plant diseases.

news.headline: Inventor from Aurora, Colo. creates MAGNETIC PLUS for easier glucose testing, helping diabetics, article on PRNewswire.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Aurora, Colorado, shared that they had created the MAGNETIC PLUS to revolutionize glucose testing for people with diabetes. The inventor expressed their goal to make the process easier by eliminating the challenges of handling small strips.

Association of Related Churches will host the ARC Conference 2025 on April 29-30 in Texas with diverse speakers and worship.
news.summary: The ARC Conference 2025, organized by the Association of Related Churches (ARC), is set to take place on April 29-30, 2025, at Milestone Church in Dallas-Fort Worth, Texas. The event aims to gather pastors, ministry leaders, and church planters for a two-day experience filled with inspiration, practical leadership insights, and impactful worship sessions. The conference will showcase a diverse lineup of speakers and worship leaders renowned for their contributions to the church community. Mark your calendars for this transformative event.

news.headline: Trump: Hopefully we should have an idea today how we're doing.
Goldman Sachs predicts U.S. copper imports to increase by 50-100%, adding 200,000 to 300,000 metric tons by Q3 due to potential tariffs. Banks forecasts a 180,000-ton global copper deficit by 2025.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs predicts a significant increase in U.S. copper imports due to anticipated tariffs from President Donald Trump's administration. The investment bank forecasts a 25% duty on copper imports by the end of the year, leading to a surge in stockpiling to pre-empt the legislation. This could result in U.S. net copper imports rising by 50-100%, equivalent to adding 200,000 to 300,000 metric tons to domestic inventories by Q3. If realized, U.S. copper stockpiles could jump from 95,000 tons to potentially 400,000 tons, comprising around half of reported global inventories. Looking ahead to 2025, Goldman Sachs anticipates a global copper deficit of 180,000 tons, driven by increasing demand for electrification, economic stimulus actions in China, and sluggish mine expansion. The bank highlights that the supply imbalance is expected to be more prominent in the latter part of the year.

MoonPay has acquired stablecoin infrastructure platform Iron for an undisclosed amount. This marks their second high-profile acquisition this year.
news.summary: MoonPay has acquired Iron, an API-focused stablecoin infrastructure developer, to enhance its enterprise customers' ability to accept stablecoin payments instantly and at a low cost. This marks MoonPay's second high-profile acquisition this year after acquiring Helio for $175 million in January. Stablecoins, with a circulation of over $230 billion, have become a significant part of the blockchain industry, with companies like Stripe and PayPal driving their adoption. The stablecoin market has seen rapid growth since 2020, with regulatory efforts like the SEC approving the first yield-bearing stablecoin in February. The acquisition by MoonPay reflects the accelerating interest in stablecoins as a viable payment solution in the crypto industry.

Europe needs to strengthen space launch capacity amid US dominance; critical to avoid dependency.
Walker & Dunlop aides in $420 million recap of Brooklyn tower Hub; 750-unit building heart of downtown.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, Walker & Dunlop, Inc. disclosed the accomplishment of a $420 million recapitalization for Hub. Hub is a prestigious 750-unit high-rise residential complex situated in downtown Brooklyn. The expert Capital Markets team at Walker & Dunlop, comprising Aaron Appel, Jonathan Schwartz, Keith Kurland, Adam Schwartz, Michael Ianno, and Christopher de Raet, served as exclusive consultants to Steiner NYC. This successful move facilitated Steiner NYC to acquire full ownership by buying out their equity partner, J.P. Morgan Asset Man.

news.headline: Europe gas drops as much as 4.5% after Putin comments.
Trend Micro boosts revenue for partners in cybersecurity with a leading platform for MSPs. #1 worldwide.
news.summary: A new platform has been launched in Dallas on March 13, 2025, by Trend Micro Incorporated. This company, ranked as the top cybersecurity partner globally, is aiming to empower managed service providers (MSPs) and enhance revenue opportunities for their partners. With their exceptional expertise, Trend Micro Incorporated is dedicated to adding value to customers through this platform. This initiative comes under the company's stock symbols TYO: 4704 and TSE: 4704.

news.headline: Inventor from Lexington, SC creates new watering can (CSK-689) for adjusting water output for plants.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, an inventor from Lexington, S.C. shared the creation of a customizable watering can with PRNewswire. The inventor aimed to address the varying watering needs of different plants with this innovation. The watering can, dubbed WATERING CAN, allows users to conveniently adjust the water output based on the plant type being watered. This design offers a tailored approach to watering various plants efficiently.

news.headline: Crude oil drops 1%, S&P 500 falls over 1%; Dollar General exceeds sales expectations with 4.5% growth to $10.3 billion.
news.summary: Midway through trading, U.S. stocks faced a decline with the S&P 500 dropping by over 1% on Thursday. The Dow was down by 1.17% at 40,865.63, the NASDAQ fell by 1.64% to 17,359.52, and the S&P 500 also decreased by 1.18% to 5,533.34. Materials shares were the top performers, climbing 0.9%, while consumer discretionary shares experienced a 1.4% dip. Dollar General Corporation (NYSE:DG) surpassed expectations with fourth-quarter sales reaching $10.304 billion, a 4.5% increase year-on-year, beating the estimated $10.264 billion. However, the EPS of $0.87 missed the consensus estimate of $1.51. Lifeward Ltd. (NASDAQ:LFWD) saw a significant rise of 78% to $2.63. More details on Benzinga.com.

HOMEE AI showcases Spatial Intelligence at NVIDIA GTC 2025, revolutionizing human-space interaction. Asia-based company forefront in reshaping industries.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, as of March 13, 2025, HOMEE AI is leading the way in transforming industries with the help of AI. Focusing on Spatial Intelligence, this company based in Asia is revolutionizing our engagement with physical spaces through Xplorer. news.headline: Clearstead Advisor, LLC appoints Robert "Bob" Thornton as Executive Chairman and Chairman of Board, bringing 30+ years experience.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on March 13, 2025, Clearstead Advisors, LLC disclosed that Robert "Bob" Thornton has been chosen to serve as the Executive Chairman and Chairman of the Board. Thornton brings over three decades of expertise in wealth management, mergers and acquisitions, and advisory services to this leadership role. The appointment of Thornton is indicative of Clearstead's focus on leveraging his extensive experience to guide the company forward.

news.headline: Stagwell unveils draft picks for SPORT BEACH 2025, with new and returning athletes, and brand partners. Convo-inspiring programming.
news.summary: An array of discussions on various aspects of sports will be the focus of the programming scheduled for this year. The multinational company Stagwell revealed its plans on March 13, 2025, in New York and Austin, Texas. Stagwell, listed on NASDAQ as STGW, is known for its innovative approach to marketing. news.headline: Human Computer secures $5.7M in seed funding led by Makers Fund, bringing total funding to $7.7M. New advisor and board member announced.
news.summary: A game studio named Human Computer, known for its collaborative creativity, has successfully raised $5.7 million in a seed funding round. The investment was led by Makers Fund, with contributions from a16z and former Airbnb COO Belinda Johnson. This latest round of funding brings the total amount raised by the company to $7.7 million. Tyler Matheson from Makers Fund will now join the board, and Sam Rosenthal, founder of The Game Band, has been appointed as the first advisor to Human Computer. The studio was established by industry veterans Alex Schleifer and Eliot Garcia Weisberg.

Madison Liquidators partners with Holland Bar Stools for premium furniture. Exciting venture in office and game room realm.
news.summary: Madison Liquidators, based in Madison, Wisconsin, revealed on March 13, 2025, a notable development in partnering with Holland Bar Stools, a well-known producer of top-tier bar stools, tables, outdoor furniture, and premium game room accessories. This collaboration aligns two prominent entities in the industry, enhancing the range and quality of offerings available to customers. This partnership signifies a significant step forward for Madison Liquidators, known for delivering high-quality office furniture and accessories.

news.headline: Four Nord Anglia Education schools rank among world's best in 2025 Spear's Schools Index. Top 100 list for private schools.
news.summary: In London on March 13, 2025, four prominent Nord Anglia Education schools have reaffirmed their position among the top private schools globally, according to the esteemed 2025 Spear's Schools Index. This index is considered a premier guide to the world's best 100 schools.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls on new Trump tariff threats, impacting Adobe, Nvidia, Tesla. Stock market sees sell-off.
news.summary: On Thursday, the Dow Jones experienced a decline following President Donald Trump's announcement of potential additional tariffs. This news led to a sell-off in the stock market, particularly affecting Nvidia and Tesla. Adobe, Nvidia, and Tesla all saw a decrease in their stock prices. The situation reflects the ongoing impact of trade tensions on the financial market.

news.headline: Dow Jones drops 400 points due to Trump tariff threat. Meta weak. Gold miners rise. Home Depot falls. Nasdaq hit hard.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced significant losses as the Nasdaq and other indexes were heavily impacted. Despite a flatlining of U.S. wholesale prices in February, Meta faced continued weakness. Home Depot saw a decline in its stock, while there was an advance for gold miners. The Dow Jones plummeted by 400 points due to a new tariff threat from President Trump. Additionally, Meta Platforms triggered a sell rule. This information was provided on Investor's Business Daily's live coverage.

news.summary: The upcoming IBM Quantum System Two will utilize a robust 156-qubit IBM Quantum Heron processor, designed for utility-scale operations. The system is set to be installed at the IBM-Euskadi Quantum Computational Center by the conclusion of 2025. Stakeholders within the center have expressed their intentions...

news.headline: Inventor creates vehicle safety product after tragic accident, aims to shatter side window automatically.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 13, 2025, a tragic vehicle accident resulted in the loss of a community patriarch. The victim, unable to escape after his truck entered a retention pond, sparked a discussion about the need for automatic window shattering devices in vehicles. This incident underscores the importance of safety measures as it claimed the life of one individual.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs predicts Boeing's production will increase by 2025. Company delivered 44 planes in February, surpassing 2024 numbers. $213 price forecast.
news.summary: Analyst Noah Poponak from Goldman Sachs expects Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) to reach $213 as per his Buy rating. The monthly update revealed that in February, Boeing delivered a total of 44 airplanes, exceeding the numbers seen early in 2024. Among them, 32 were from the 737 family built in Renton, with 31 being 737 MAX jets. Additionally, the company secured 13 new gross orders for the 737 MAX during the same month. The analyst pointed out positive trends in new aircraft orders.

news.headline: Qalby Etmaan introduces 'Clay Donation Boxes' to promote sustainability and Emirati craftsmanship as part of Year of Community.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, in Dubai, UAE, the Qalby Etmaan program introduced the 'Clay Donation Boxes' initiative for its eighth season as part of the country's "Year of Community" initiative. Under the visionary leadership of the United Arab Emirates, this program aims to promote community engagement.

news.headline: Changpeng Zhao refutes Binance.US deal rumors and defends Trump. Denies seeking pardon for role in Binance. #ChangpengZhao #Binance #Trump
news.summary: Changpeng Zhao, the former CEO of Binance, has refuted claims from a Wall Street Journal report suggesting he was pursuing a federal pardon from US President Donald Trump. In a post on March 13, Zhao stated he had no involvement in discussions regarding a business deal between the Trump family and Binance.US. He also denied seeking a pardon from Trump that would potentially allow him to take on a role at Binance. Zhao emphasized that while no felon would reject a pardon, he believes the article is an attempt to criticize the President and the crypto industry. He expressed concerns about the lingering effects of the previous administration's stance on cryptocurrencies. Zhao's comments were in response to the aforementioned report published on March 13 by the Wall Street Journal. Further updates on this matter will be provided as more information becomes available.

news.headline: KV Capital introduces new fund for Canadian investors, targeting 14%-18% annual returns in Building Products Strategy.
news.summary: In Edmonton, Alberta, KV Capital introduced the establishment of KV Building Products Access Fund LP. This closed-end fund grants eligible and accredited Canadian investors the opportunity to invest in collaboration with KV and its institutional partners in the firm’s Building Products Strategy. The fund aims to achieve annual returns ranging from 14% to 18% from the private equity portfolio within the strategy. The Access Fund represents a recent addition to the Building Products Strategy, focusing on growth within the housing construction sector.

news.headline: MikeWorldWide acquires Berk Communications to form largest sports practice in nation, adding expertise in entertainment/lifestyle PR. Berk to operate independently with Mike's resources.
news.summary: A merger has formed the largest sports practice in the nation, bringing expertise in entertainment and lifestyle PR. Berk will remain an independent brand but will now have access to Mike's wide range of integrated resources and AI tools. The merger was announced in New York on March 13, 2025.

news.headline: Post-Covid workdays are shorter, yet more productive. -Bloomberg
BrickImaging in Denver now selling Stayntech® - their exclusive brick stain - after 50 years.
news.summary: Headquartered in the Denver metropolitan area, BrickImaging® has unveiled its proprietary masonry stain Stayntech® for sale to the public. Originally utilized exclusively by BrickImaging for almost five decades, Stayntech is now accessible for purchase. The commercial-grade Stayntech masonry stains from BrickImaging have brought a modern and revitalized look to various structures, including office buildings, apartment complexes, hospitals, government buildings, and shopping centers. Stayntech marks the first masonry staining firm in North America and is now offering its revolutionary product to a wider audience.

news.headline: 2024 State of the Market Report finds PJM wholesale electricity markets remain competitive with positive results.
news.summary: The PJM Interconnection's wholesale electric energy market in EAGLEVILLE, Pa. has been reported to have had a competitive performance in 2024, as per the recently released 2024 State of the Market Report for PJM by Monitoring Analytics, LLC. The report highlights significant findings indicating that the market operated competitively with key figures showing promising outcomes.
